task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Mario Rossi
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oscar EMR interface showing the demographic or eChart page for patient 'Mario Rossi'.
The Oscar EMR prescription/medication module is open and active for the patient.

task_completion.description: Select the correct drug and strength
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drug 'Amoxicillin' and strength '500' (or 500mg) are selected or typed into the prescription drug search/entry fields.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct instructions, quantity, and repeats
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescription form shows instructions containing 'three times daily' and '10 days', a quantity of '30', and repeats set to '0'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specific name for the prescription favorite
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Strep Throat - Amox 500' is entered into the 'Favorite Name' or 'Save as Favorite' input field.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the favorite in the Favorites list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescription favorite 'Strep Throat - Amox 500' is visible in the user's saved Favorites list or a clear success confirmation is shown indicating it was saved.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with Oscar EMR
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the Oscar EMR web application, not a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to execute database SQL inserts, curl commands, or scripts to create the favorite directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the visible input fields of the Oscar EMR UI, without evidence of browser developer tools being used to manipulate the DOM to fake completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Provider number 999998 corresponds to the 'oscardoc' user. The expected drug is Amoxicillin 500mg. The expected quantity is 30. The expected instructions must include 'three times daily' and '10 days'. The favorite must be named exactly 'Strep Throat - Amox 500' (ignore metadata if it only says 'Strep Throat', the full name is required by the task).
